creator: Alexander Terp
description: Getting a script's own PID currently requires quiet $...echo $PPID... plus knowing that rad shells out through a zsh child - an implementation detail that silently breaks the workaround if it changes. Add a get_pid() builtin returning the rad process PID. Split from the process-primitives item in #139; the bg/detached-spawn half is folded into RAD-329/RAD-353.
title: get_pid() builtin
